microsoft-learn__microsoft_code_sample_s: Finds official Microsoft Learn code examples, quickstarts, snippets, and implementation samples for SDKs, services, APIs, infrastructure, and developer workflows. [keywords: Entra ID, Azure Functions, Function App, Cosmos DB, Service Bus, AKS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Blob Storage, Key Vault, OpenAI, Synapse, Purview, Bicep, ARM templates, Graph, SharePoint, Teams, Kusto, PowerShell, Java, Python, TypeScript, C#, Azure Firewall, Virtual Network, VNet, NSG, Application Gateway, WAF, Load Balancer, VPN Gateway, ExpressRoute, Front Door, Traffic Manager, Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, App Service, Container Apps, Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, Storage Account, Managed Identity, Azure AD, RBAC, Private Link, Private Endpoint, Azure Policy, Defender, Sentinel, quickstart, snippet, sample code]
microsoft-learn__microsoft_docs_search: Searches Microsoft Learn documentation for any Azure service, Microsoft product, or developer topic. Returns guidance articles, reference pages, titles, URLs, and excerpts. Covers all Azure domains: networking, security, compute, storage, databases, identity, monitoring, DevOps, AI, and governance. [keywords: Azure, Microsoft, cloud, documentation, docs, networking, firewall, Azure Firewall, virtual network, VNet, subnet, NSG, network security group, Application Gateway, WAF, Load Balancer, VPN, ExpressRoute, Front Door, Traffic Manager, Private Link, Private Endpoint, DNS, DDoS, Bastion, security, Defender, Sentinel, Key Vault, RBAC, Managed Identity, Entra ID, Azure AD, conditional access, compute, Virtual Machine, VM, App Service, Container Apps, AKS, Kubernetes, Azure Functions, serverless, storage, Blob Storage, Storage Account, Azure Files, Data Lake, database, Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, monitoring, Azure Monitor, Log Analytics, Application Insights, alerts, diagnostics, DevOps, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Bicep, ARM templates, CI/CD, AI, OpenAI, Cognitive Services, Machine Learning, governance, Azure Policy, Cost Management, Purview, Fabric, Power Platform, Intune, Graph, architecture, deployment, migration, troubleshooting, best practices, pricing, SLA]
microsoft-learn__microsoft_docs_fetch: Fetches one specific Microsoft Learn page by URL and lets you read the full page, full article, or exact docs URL content as markdown after search has identified the page. [keywords: url, learn url, exact url, page retrieval, full article, markdown conversion, read page, read fully, fetch url, detailed content, full content, page body, complete page, docs page content, full docs page, article body, get full page content, exact docs url as markdown, turn page into markdown, load full article from learn url]
office__azure_calculate_cost: Calculates estimated monthly and annual Azure resource costs from cached retail pricing using service, SKU, region, quantity, and usage hours.
office__azure_clear_cache: Clears cached Azure pricing data from memory and disk for all services or selected service and region combinations.
office__azure_fetch_prices: Fetches and caches Azure Retail Prices API data for selected services, regions, and currency codes for later offline queries.
office__azure_list_cached_services: Lists Azure pricing datasets currently cached in memory and on disk, including service, region, age, and validity.
office__azure_list_regions: Lists Azure ARM regions available in cached or fetched retail pricing data, optionally filtered by service.
office__azure_list_services: Lists Azure service names available in cached or fetched retail pricing data for a region and currency.
office__azure_query_prices: Queries cached Azure retail pricing items by service, region, SKU, product, and price type to return matching price records.
office__excel_add_chart: Adds a line, bar, column, or pie chart to an Excel worksheet from a data range with optional title and placement.
office__excel_add_sheet: Creates a new empty worksheet in an Excel workbook at the start, end, or after a named sheet.
office__excel_delete_comment: Deletes a cell comment from an Excel worksheet by cell reference and optional sheet name.
office__excel_from_markdown: Creates an Excel workbook from one or more GitHub Flavored Markdown tables, using headings to name sheets when available.
office__excel_list_sheets: Lists worksheet names, visibility, dimensions, tables, and basic metadata for an Excel workbook.
office__list_supported_formats: Lists the Office document formats and specialized tools supported by this MCP server across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.
office__office_audit: Audits Word, Excel, or PowerPoint files for placeholders, completion gaps, tracking state, formatting issues, and document-specific validation problems.
office__office_comment: Adds, retrieves, or deletes comments in Word, Excel, or PowerPoint documents through one cross-format interface.
office__office_help: Provides structured workflow recommendations for Office document tasks such as SOW generation, workbook patching, deck creation, and completion audits.
office__office_image: Inserts an image into a Word, Excel, or PowerPoint document at a format-specific target such as section, cell, or slide.
office__office_inspect: Inspects document structure and metadata across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, including sheets, sections, tables, slides, shapes, comments, and tracking.
office__office_patch: Applies targeted edits to Word, Excel, or PowerPoint documents, including Excel workbook cells and ranges, Word sections and placeholders, and PowerPoint slide shapes with safe or strict modes.
office__office_read: Reads Word, Excel, or PowerPoint content as structured JSON or Markdown, with optional Excel sheet or range scoping.
office__office_set_comment_identity: Sets the default commenter name, identity, and initials used by later Office comment operations in the current server session.
office__office_table: Gets, appends, updates, or creates tables in Word, Excel, or PowerPoint documents, including adding staffing or delivery rows to existing tables.
office__office_template: Copies a Word SOW, Excel workbook, or PowerPoint deck template and inspects placeholders, sections, tables, and formatting for template-driven document workflows.
office__p_document_audit: Prompt-style workflow guide for auditing deliverables, checking placeholders and completion, fixing issues, reviewing track changes, and cleaning final output.
office__p_section_editing: Prompt-style workflow guide for editing narrative Word sections by inspecting guidance, drafting replacements, and patching tracked content.
office__p_sow_generation: Prompt-style workflow guide for end-to-end SOW creation from template copy and analysis through generation, audit, cleanup, and review.
office__p_table_editing: Prompt-style workflow guide for reading and editing structured SOW tables such as objectives, epics, staffing, and delivery tables.
office__pptx_add_slide: Adds a new slide to an existing PowerPoint presentation using a chosen layout, optional title, and insertion position.
office__pptx_add_table: Adds a PowerPoint table to a slide with headers, optional rows, and explicit size and position controls.
office__pptx_delete_comment: Deletes one PowerPoint comment by index or removes all comments from a selected slide.
office__pptx_delete_slide: Deletes a slide from a PowerPoint presentation while preserving the remaining deck structure.
office__pptx_duplicate_slide: Duplicates an existing PowerPoint slide, including shapes and formatting, and inserts the copy after the source or at the end.
office__pptx_from_markdown: Creates a PowerPoint presentation from Markdown headings, bullets, tables, and notes using layout-aware slide generation.
office__pptx_get_notes: Reads speaker notes from one slide or all slides in a PowerPoint presentation.
office__pptx_hide_slide: Hides or unhides a PowerPoint slide without deleting it from the presentation.
office__pptx_list_slides: Lists PowerPoint slides with titles, layouts, note presence, visibility, and basic shape metadata.
office__pptx_log_changes: Appends timestamped PowerPoint change-log entries to slide notes to keep an edit history for the deck.
office__pptx_recommend_layout: Recommends the best PowerPoint slide layout, plus alternatives, for content types such as title, bullets, comparison, image, or table slides.
office__pptx_reorder_slides: Reorders all slides in a PowerPoint presentation according to a complete user-supplied slide order.
office__pptx_set_notes: Sets or appends speaker notes for a PowerPoint slide, creating the notes text frame when needed.
office__restart_server: Restarts the Office MCP server so code changes are reloaded without manual process management.
office__web_check_url: Checks whether a URL is reachable and reports status code, redirects, and content type without fetching the full page body.
office__web_extract_links: Fetches a web page and extracts hyperlinks, with optional regex filtering and same-domain restriction.
office__web_extract_tables: Fetches a web page and extracts HTML tables as structured headers and row data.
office__web_fetch: Fetches a web page, optionally extracts the readable main content, and converts it to Markdown.
office__web_search: Searches the web with DuckDuckGo and returns titles, URLs, and snippets without fetching full page content.
office__word_accept_all_changes: Accepts tracked insertions and deletions in a Word document to produce a clean final document without revision markup.
office__word_cleanup_sow: Removes template guidance and instructional artifacts from a generated SOW while preserving document structure.
office__word_create_sow_from_markdown: Parses Markdown into structured SOW data and fills a Word template to generate a statement of work document.
office__word_delete_comment: Deletes a Word comment by comment ID and removes its associated reference markers from the document.
office__word_document_map: Returns a compact map of a Word document including sections, tables, placeholders, anchors, and structural warnings.
office__word_enable_track_changes: Enables Word track changes mode in a document so later edits appear as visible revisions.
office__word_extract_sow_structure: Parses an existing SOW Word document into structured sections, categorized tables, and extracted data for reuse.
office__word_from_markdown: Creates a new Word document populated from Markdown summary or report content, supporting headings, lists, tables, code blocks, and inline formatting.
office__word_generate_sow: Fills a Word SOW template with structured engagement data, table content, placeholders, and optional narrative sections.
office__word_get_comments: Extracts all comments from a Word document with author, date, initials, and comment text.
office__word_get_section_guidance: Extracts section-specific writing guidance from a Word template by finding instructions, placeholders, highlights, and related hints.
office__word_insert_at_anchor: Inserts paragraphs before or after a heading or anchor paragraph in a Word document without replacing the whole section.
office__word_list_anchors: Lists headings and high-signal paragraphs in a Word document that can be used as stable insertion anchors.
office__word_parse_sow_template: Inspects a Word SOW template to identify placeholders, sections, tables, guidance text, and anchor structure before generation or patching.
office__word_patch_with_track_changes: Replaces text in a Word document using tracked revision markup so reviewers can see insertions and deletions.
